description: A Biostatistician needs to analyze heart disease risk factors using the UCI Cleveland dataset. Connect to the Oracle database (User: RESEARCH, Password: research123, PDB: XEPDB1) to create a view named PATIENT_COHORTS_VW containing all columns from HEART_PATIENTS and a COHORT column ('DISEASE' if diagnosis > 0, else 'NORMAL'). Create a table STUDY_RESULTS with columns METRIC_NAME (VARCHAR2) and METRIC_VALUE (NUMBER). Populate STUDY_RESULTS with the following statistics (precise to 4 decimal places): 'P_VALUE_HR_DIFF' (two-sided P-value for Max Heart Rate (THALACH) difference between cohorts using STATS_T_TEST_INDEP), 'CORRELATION_AGE_CHOL' (Pearson correlation between Age and Cholesterol (CHOL) using CORR), 'AVG_HR_DISEASE' (average Max Heart Rate for DISEASE cohort), and 'AVG_HR_NORMAL' (average Max Heart Rate for NORMAL cohort).
